pub mod dyn_encoding
pub enum dyn_encoding::CodecError
pub dyn_encoding::CodecError::Decode(alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync)>)
pub dyn_encoding::CodecError::Encode(alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync)>)
pub dyn_encoding::CodecError::TypeMismatch
pub dyn_encoding::CodecError::TypeMismatch::expected: dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
pub dyn_encoding::CodecError::UnknownTypeId(dyn_encoding::WireTypeId)
impl dyn_encoding::CodecError
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::decode_failure<E>(E) -> Self where E: core::convert::Into<alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync)>>
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::encode_failure<E>(E) -> Self where E: core::convert::Into<alloc::boxed::Box<(dyn core::error::Error + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync)>>
impl core::error::Error for dyn_encoding::CodecError
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::source(&self) -> core::option::Option<&(dyn core::error::Error + 'static)>
impl core::fmt::Debug for dyn_encoding::CodecError
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for dyn_encoding::CodecError
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Freeze for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl core::marker::Send for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl core::marker::Sync for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl core::marker::Unpin for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl<ST, DT> zerocopy::pointer::invariant::CastableFrom<ST, zerocopy::pointer::invariant::Initialized, zerocopy::pointer::invariant::Initialized> for dyn_encoding::CodecError where ST: ?core::marker::Sized, DT: ?core::marker::Sized
impl<ST, DT> zerocopy::pointer::invariant::CastableFrom<ST, zerocopy::pointer::invariant::Uninit, zerocopy::pointer::invariant::Uninit> for dyn_encoding::CodecError where ST: ?core::marker::Sized, DT: ?core::marker::Sized
impl<T, U> core::convert::Into<U> for dyn_encoding::CodecError where U: core::convert::From<T>
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::into(self) -> U
impl<T, U> core::convert::TryFrom<U> for dyn_encoding::CodecError where U: core::convert::Into<T>
pub type dyn_encoding::CodecError::Error = core::convert::Infallible
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::try_from(U) -> core::result::Result<T, <T as core::convert::TryFrom<U>>::Error>
impl<T, U> core::convert::TryInto<U> for dyn_encoding::CodecError where U: core::convert::TryFrom<T>
pub type dyn_encoding::CodecError::Error = <U as core::convert::TryFrom<T>>::Error
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::try_into(self) -> core::result::Result<U, <U as core::convert::TryFrom<T>>::Error>
impl<T> alloc::string::ToString for dyn_encoding::CodecError where T: core::fmt::Display + ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::to_string(&self) -> alloc::string::String
impl<T> core::any::Any for dyn_encoding::CodecError where T: 'static + ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::type_id(&self) -> core::any::TypeId
impl<T> core::borrow::Borrow<T> for dyn_encoding::CodecError where T: ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::borrow(&self) -> &T
impl<T> core::borrow::BorrowMut<T> for dyn_encoding::CodecError where T: ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::borrow_mut(&mut self) -> &mut T
impl<T> core::convert::From<T> for dyn_encoding::CodecError
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::from(T) -> T
impl<T> tap::conv::Conv for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl<T> tap::conv::TryConv for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl<T> tap::pipe::Pipe for dyn_encoding::CodecError where T: ?core::marker::Sized
impl<T> tap::tap::Tap for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl<T> wyz::fmt::FmtForward for dyn_encoding::CodecError
impl<T> zerocopy::pointer::invariant::Read<zerocopy::pointer::invariant::Exclusive, zerocopy::pointer::invariant::BecauseExclusive> for dyn_encoding::CodecError where T: ?core::marker::Sized
impl<V, T> ppv_lite86::types::VZip<V> for dyn_encoding::CodecError where V: ppv_lite86::types::MultiLane<T>
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecError::vzip(self) -> V
pub struct dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
impl dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
pub fn dyn_encoding::BebopCodec::new() -> Self
pub fn dyn_encoding::BebopCodec::register<T>(&mut self) -> &mut Self where T: dyn_encoding::BebopWire + 'static
pub fn dyn_encoding::BebopCodec::registered_type_count(&self) -> usize
impl core::default::Default for dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
pub fn dyn_encoding::BebopCodec::default() -> dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
impl dyn_encoding::WireCodec for dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
pub fn dyn_encoding::BebopCodec::content_type(&self) -> &'static str
pub fn dyn_encoding::BebopCodec::decode(&self, dyn_encoding::WireTypeId, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn dyn_encoding::ErasedWireValue>, dyn_encoding::CodecError>
pub fn dyn_encoding::BebopCodec::encode(&self, &dyn dyn_encoding::ErasedWireValue) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, dyn_encoding::CodecError>
impl core::marker::Freeze for dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
impl core::marker::Send for dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
impl core::marker::Sync for dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
impl core::marker::Unpin for dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for dyn_encoding::BebopCodec
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for dyn_encoding::BebopCodec

pub struct dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry
impl dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry::content_types(&self) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = &'static str> + '_
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry::for_content_type(&self, &str) -> core::option::Option<&dyn dyn_encoding::WireCodec>
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry::new() -> Self
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry::register<C: dyn_encoding::WireCodec + 'static>(&mut self, C)
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry::with_baseline() -> Self
impl core::default::Default for dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry
pub fn dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry::default() -> Self
impl core::marker::Freeze for dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry
impl core::marker::Send for dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry
impl core::marker::Sync for dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry
impl core::marker::Unpin for dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry

impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for dyn_encoding::CodecRegistry

pub struct dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec
impl dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec
pub fn dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec::new() -> Self
pub fn dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec::register<T>(&mut self) -> &mut Self where T: dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersWire + 'static
pub fn dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec::registered_type_count(&self) -> usize
impl core::default::Default for dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec
pub fn dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec::default() -> dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec
impl dyn_encoding::WireCodec for dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec
pub fn dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec::content_type(&self) -> &'static str
pub fn dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec::decode(&self, dyn_encoding::WireTypeId, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn dyn_encoding::ErasedWireValue>, dyn_encoding::CodecError>
pub fn dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec::encode(&self, &dyn dyn_encoding::ErasedWireValue) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, dyn_encoding::CodecError>

impl core::marker::Send for dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec
impl core::marker::Sync for dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersCodec

pub struct dyn_encoding::WireTypeId(_)
impl dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
pub const fn dyn_encoding::WireTypeId::as_str(self) -> &'static str
pub const fn dyn_encoding::WireTypeId::new(&'static str) -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireTypeId::clone(&self) -> dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::cmp::Eq for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireTypeId::eq(&self, &dyn_encoding::WireTypeId) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireTypeId::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireTypeId::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::hash::Hash for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireTypeId::hash<__H: core::hash::Hasher>(&self, &mut __H)
impl core::marker::Copy for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::marker::Freeze for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::marker::Send for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::marker::Sync for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::marker::Unpin for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl<Q, K> equivalent::Equivalent<K> for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId where Q: core::cmp::Eq + ?core::marker::Sized, K: core::borrow::Borrow<Q> + ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireTypeId::equivalent(&self, &K) -> bool
impl<Q, K> hashbrown::Equivalent<K> for dyn_encoding::WireTypeId where Q: core::cmp::Eq + ?core::marker::Sized, K: core::borrow::Borrow<Q> + ?core::marker::Sized
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireTypeId::equivalent(&self, &K) -> bool

pub fn dyn_encoding::BebopWire::bebop_encode(&self) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, dyn_encoding::CodecError>

pub fn dyn_encoding::CapnpWire::capnp_encode(&self) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, dyn_encoding::CodecError>

pub fn dyn_encoding::ErasedWireValue::as_any(&self) -> &dyn core::any::Any
pub fn dyn_encoding::ErasedWireValue::type_id(&self) -> dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
impl<T> dyn_encoding::ErasedWireValue for T where T: dyn_encoding::WireValue
pub fn T::as_any(&self) -> &dyn core::any::Any
pub fn T::type_id(&self) -> dyn_encoding::WireTypeId
pub trait dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersWire: dyn_encoding::WireValue + core::marker::Sized
pub fn dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersWire::flatbuffers_decode(&[u8]) -> core::result::Result<Self, dyn_encoding::CodecError>
pub fn dyn_encoding::FlatbuffersWire::flatbuffers_encode(&self) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>, dyn_encoding::CodecError>
pub trait dyn_encoding::WireCodec: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireCodec::content_type(&self) -> &'static str
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireCodec::decode(&self, dyn_encoding::WireTypeId, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn dyn_encoding::ErasedWireValue>, dyn_encoding::CodecError>

pub trait dyn_encoding::WireValue: core::fmt::Debug + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub fn dyn_encoding::WireValue::wire_type_id() -> dyn_encoding::WireTypeId where Self: core::marker::Sized
